name: Empresas Copec S.A.
summary: Empresas Copec S.A., together with its subsidiaries, operates in the natural resources and energy sectors. The company produces and markets pulp, wood panels, and sawn timber; distributes liquid fuels, lubricants, liquefied petroleum gas, and natural gas; and produces fishmeal, fish oil, Omega-3 concentrates, and canned and frozen products. It also engages in the metal and coal mining; and renewable electricity generation and real estate businesses. The company operates a network of approximately 3300 gas stations, as well as convenience stores. It operates in Chile, Colombia, Panama, Argentina, Brazil, Uruguay, Ecuador, the Dominican Republic, Peru, Mexico, the United States, and Canada. The company was incorporated in 1934 and is based in Santiago, Chile. Empresas Copec S.A. is a subsidiary of AntarChile S.A.
